title: From<TssError> doc says 'inspect the code field' without explaining how
description: wolftpm-tss/src/error.rs From<TssError> doc says callers 'must inspect the code field' to distinguish TPM-layer from transport errors, but gives no guidance on how. A user at 2am can't act on this. The doc should state: TPM-layer errors are TssError codes (u32 values from the TPM2 spec, 0x0001–0x0FFF); wolfTPM transport errors are negative i32 values cast to u32 (>= 0x8000_0000). Or better: add a dedicated Tpm { rc } variant in a future breaking release and reference the tracking issue.
